name: Cold Lemon Chicken with "Fragrant Green
recipeIngredient: 4 tbsp cilantro leaves and stem, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine the onion, chicken breast, and celery leaves with enough water to cover.
2. Bring to a slow boil over medium heat, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
3. Remove from the heat and allow the chicken to cool in the liquid.
4. Once cooled, remove the skin and bones from the chicken and slice it.
5. In a bowl, mix together the lemon sauce and dark soy sauce with the sliced chicken.
6. Marinate for 45 minutes.
7. On a serving dish, arrange the chicken slices on a bed of lettuce leaves.
8. Sprinkle with the chopped cilantro.
9. Drizzle lemon juice over the chicken slices.
10. Guests can roll up the chicken in a lettuce leaf like an egg roll before eating.
Makes 8 to 10 appetizer servings.
